scripts.list-models: node -e "import dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config(); fetch('https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=' + process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY).then(r => r.json()).then(d => console.log(d.models ? d.models.map(m => m.name) : d))"
scripts.test-env: node -e "import dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config(); console.log('KEY:', process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY ? 'DEFINED_OF_LENGTH_' + process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY.length : 'UNDEFINED')"
